description_long: This is a medium-sized deciduous tree with a single, slightly curved trunk supporting a wide, irregularly shaped canopy. The canopy is dense and filled with numerous green, broad leaves that create a lush, full appearance. The branches radiate outward in a somewhat alternate pattern, giving the tree a natural, asymmetrical silhouette. The trunk is dark brown and textured, tapering as it rises and branching out into several main limbs. No roots are visible above ground, and the foliage is thick enough to obscure much of the inner structure. This tree would be commonly found lining urban streets, in parks, or as part of landscaped public spaces.
description: A medium-sized deciduous tree with a dense, broadleaf canopy and a single, slightly curved trunk. The foliage is lush and green, forming an irregular, natural silhouette.
description_view_0: The tree is seen from an angle highlighting the leftward spread of the canopy and the slight curve of the trunk.
description_view_1: This view shows the tree from the rear, with the trunk centered and the canopy appearing more symmetrical and upright.
description_view_2: The right side of the tree is visible, displaying the wide horizontal spread of the branches and the fullness of the foliage.
description_view_3: The tree is viewed from the opposite side, emphasizing the dense foliage and the trunk's vertical alignment.
